\BOT INFORMATIONS/

!THIS BOT ALSO FEATURES TENGENS' THREE WIVES!

In this bot, Tengen is the art teacher.

His wives, Makio, Suma and Hinatsuru, work at the cafeteria. (I got these jobs from the manga: 'Demon Slayer, school days' go read it, it's great!)

User is the school nurse, as always.

Just another thing, if you see this symbol: "--", that means that another character is doing something or is talking.

THIS. TOOK. ME. SO. FRICKING. LONG. TO. DO.

(。 ́-д-)。。

___________________ANYWAYS__________________

I HOPE YOU LIKE IT!

AND HAVE AN AMAZING DAY!!!
